name: AVA WANG
tagline: NORDIC-TRAINED PRODUCT DESIGNER, DEVOTED TO AI INNOVATION. \n 北欧留学，专注热爱AI创新的产品设计师

about.title: Hello there \n I'm Ava Wang
about.bio:
Rooted in architectural logic and Nordic design, I balance structural precision with creative intuition in AI innovation. Evolving from physical spaces to digital products, I blend design sensibility with a product mindset to build experiences that truly work for people.

植根于建筑学的严谨逻辑，接受北欧设计理念的熏陶。我致力于在 AI 驱动的创新中寻找结构精准与创意直觉的平衡点。从物理空间延伸至AI产品前沿，通过融合设计师的感性与产品思维，打造真正贴合用户需求的体验。

footer.tagline:
Do you like
What you see?

projects.title: Mood Forest 心情森林
projects.description:
Mood Forest reimagines the desktop plant as an empathetic AI "buddy" for the modern workplace. Moving beyond manual journaling, it uses natural language interaction to listen to users' daily reflections, automatically summarizing them into personalized digital stickers. The system visualizes emotional cycles through a generative forest, where each tree’s growth reflects the user’s mood. Integrated with 3D-printing and NFC technology, the plant serves as a physical social touchpoint, allowing colleagues to leave messages and interact via a simple "tap," bridging personal reflection with spontaneous workplace connection. 
「心情森林」将传统的工位绿植重构为懂你的 AI “职场搭子”。它摒弃了繁琐的文字记录，通过自然语言交互倾听并总结用户的每日心境，生成极具个性化的手账便签。系统根据情绪数据动态生成一棵“心情树”，并以月度为周期汇聚成可视化的数字森林。结合 3D 打印与 NFC 技术，这一虚实结合的生态让盆栽成为了工位上的物理社交媒介，同事间可以通过手机“碰一碰”轻松留言互动，将私密的情绪调节转化为温情的职场社交。          
🎙️ Voice Journaling (语音即日记)
🌲 Mood Visualization (情绪可视化)
🏷️ NFC Social Touch (NFC 实体社交)

projects.title: Conversational AI Avatar 虚拟人交互产品
projects.description:
A hardware-integrated AI system for primary education, featuring portrait-screen digital humans for immersive, face-to-face interaction. Powered by noise-adaptive ASR and synchronized motion, it enables natural dialogue in bustling campuses. By providing real-time emotional feedback, the system moves beyond one-way teaching to foster active inquiry in a new smart education ecosystem.
产品面向小学场景，采用软硬件结合的竖屏交互形态，让学生与AI虚拟人面对面沉浸式互动。搭载嘈杂环境自适应ASR识别与TTS合成技术，搭配拟人化表情、动作同步驱动，支持学生在校园场景自然提问，实时获得带语音反馈与情绪表达的智能解答。它打破传统教育单向输出的局限，培养主动探究的学习习惯，打造沉浸式智慧教育新生态。

projects.title: AI Educational Software AI教学软件
projects.description:
An AI-driven lesson preparation and delivery platform tailored for primary school science educators. It streamlines workflows by auto-generating curriculum-aligned lesson plans and interactive multimedia slides. Featuring a vast library of digital experiments and 3D visual aids, the system bridges the gap between abstract concepts and hands-on learning, empowering teachers to deliver high-impact, immersive science education with minimal prep time.
专为小学科学教师打造的 AI 智能备授课平台。深度集成新课标要求，支持一键生成高品质教案与多媒体课件。系统内置丰富的数字实验素材与 3D 交互资源，有效解决科学课堂实验演示难、资源搜集耗时等痛点，助力教师从繁琐备课中释放，通过高效率的沉浸式教学激发学生对科学的探索欲。

projects.title: Growth Journal 溯星
projects.description:
AI-driven growth ecosystem visualizing reflections as celestial nodes on a dynamic S-curved star-track. It distills deep insights to automatically generate a "Personal Manual" and "Manifestation Album," transforming linear journaling into a visualized mental landscape.
基于AI构建的沉浸式自我成长应用。以动态 S 型粒子星轨为核心视觉形态，将碎片化的日记记录转化为宇宙中可感知的“星辰节点”。通过 AI 深度语义分析，系统能从个人输入的感悟中提炼核心洞察，并自动建模生成 “个人说明书” 与 “显化专辑”。它打破了传统日记的线性记录模式，让每一次自我反思都成为可视化的精神景观，构建数字化的个人成长生态

projects.title: Traces 光影痕迹
projects.description:
A visual log of spaces and light across latitudes. From the stillness of the Nordics to the dynamic flow of Chinese cities, capturing the subtle traces of interaction between people and the spaces they inhabit.
一份跨越纬度的空间与光影的视觉日志。从北欧的静谧到国内城市的律动，捕捉人与栖居环境之间微妙的交互痕迹。

projects.title: Hackathon 黑客马拉松
projects.description:
Addressing the blurred boundaries of 2020, this state-shifter restores balance. Work mode uses Lumi-Sync to harmonize UI with natural light, while a ritualistic gesture transitions the system into HomeStock, an intuitive kitchen manager. By prioritizing MVP scope, the project demonstrates how design can protect sensory boundaries while delivering efficiency.
该项目针对2020年生活与工作边界模糊的痛点，它是一个具备环境感知的状态切换器。在工作模式下，它通过Lumi-Sync实时同步窗外自然光色，减缓数字孤岛感；当用户以“拉起窗帘”的手势极具仪式感地关闭办公链路后，它又化身为HomeStock厨房助手，直观化解居家囤货的焦虑。通过在黑客松中对MVP的精准权衡，展示了如何通过交互设计为工具注入情绪价值：好的产品不应只是效率的杠杆，更应是人类感官边界的守护者。
